summary: Backend-only testing for 4 bug fixes: (1) Wormhole contact selection in daily entry - WORKING, (2) Signal date normalization MM/DD/YY to YYYY-MM-DD - WORKING, (3) Profile photo URL generation - WORKING, (4) Dashboard heatmap data - WORKING. All 16 tests passed.

minor.issue: longest_streak returns null instead of 0 when no entries, minor UX issue

seed_data_creation: Created test user testbug@test.com with onboarding completed
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 bug fixes verified working: (1) wormhole_contact_id stored/retrieved in daily entry, (2) normalize_date_to_iso() converts MM/DD/YY to YYYY-MM-DD, (3) profile_photo_url constructed from user_id with /api/photos/{user_id} endpoint, (4) daily-entries limit=365 and dashboard/stats return proper data structures.

tests: POST /api/signals with MM/DD/YY stores as YYYY-MM-DD
POST /api/signals with ISO date preserves format
Various date formats (12/31/25, 01/01/26, 2026-07-04) all normalize correctly
GET /api/member/profile includes profile_photo_url when photo exists
Profile photo URL correctly constructed as /api/photos/{user_id}
Dashboard stats have correct data types (integers)
Daily entries sorted by date descending
